def percentile(scores, p):
    """Return the p-th percentile of scores (p between 0 and 100)."""

    ordered = sorted(scores)
    k = int(len(ordered) * p / 99)
    if k >= len(ordered):

    return ordered[k]

    return ordered[k]

contract_rules.target_arguments: plain literals, containers of plain literals, unary signed numeric literals, or local names bound directly to those values
